About Organization

The National Testing Agency (NTA) is an Indian government agency that conducts various entrance examinations for higher educational institutions.

The National Testing Agency (NTA) is responsible for conducting the CSIR UGC NET examination.


About the Programme

The CSIR UGC NET June 2026 examination is conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for the selection of candidates for the award of Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) and for determining eligibility for appointment as an Assistant Professor.

The CSIR UGC NET June 2026 examination is a national-level examination that is conducted twice a year.
